mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, role, language, ability_profile, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{language}, #{abilityProfile}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT u.*, r.id as r_id, r.name as r_name, r.description as r_description FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET language = #{language}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_role SET role_id = #{roleId} WHERE user_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{page}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM submit WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET ability_profile = #{abilityProfile}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, bio = #{bio}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, github_url = #{githubUrl}, blog_url = #{blogUrl}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET total_solved = #{totalSolved}, total_submissions = #{totalSubmissions}, study_hours = #{studyHours}, ranking = #{ranking}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
